caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses performs while singing into a microphone. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a black vest with blue embroidered floral patterns, and a red and white decorative belt. He holds a light-colored acoustic guitar and stands before a backdrop of horizontal wooden slats. The heads of several audience members are visible in the foreground, partially obscuring the lower portion of the scene. A black music stand sits in front of the performer, and the text "ORCA" is displayed in white capital letters on the right side of the frame. Across the sequence, the man remains in a consistent position, though his facial expressions and mouth movements shift as he sings, and his hands move slightly on the guitar. The camera angle and lighting remain static throughout the performance.
